title: Fit test - 2nd screen UI
scenario: Fit Test second screen UI does not match Figma design specifications when accessed via Device Settings > Fit Test > Start Test on Osprey/Tern and Emu variants
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Observe the second screen UI that appears
expected: The second screen UI of the Fit Test feature matches the Figma design specifications for both Osprey/Tern and Emu variants.
